summary: Russian FPV drones killed a Ukrainian evacuation team near Huliaipole around 17:30 during a declared ceasefire, while another strike hit a civilian parking area in Kherson's Korabelnyi district. Ukrainian forces used FPV drones to destroy a Russian UAZ Bukhanka, killing at least two troops, and to repel motorcycle-mounted assaults. The Russian "Rubicon" Center reported intercepting over 2,000 Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs and destroying 110 targets on April 11, 2026, with unmanned systems comprising 36.4% of their recorded kills. Ukrainian forces noted increased Russian electronic warfare antenna size and reduced FPV control frequency, while surviving an FPV attack near Kostiantynivka after detecting the drone with a handheld detector.
